name: Fix AI Inference Schema
description: The Pydantic model 'InferenceRequest' is failing when the 'confidence' score is a float because it was defined as an 'int'. Fix the type hint.Function must be named 'solution'.
broken_code:
from pydantic import BaseModel
from typing import List

class InferenceRequest(BaseModel):
    text: str
    # BROKEN: Should be float
    confidence: int

def solution(data_dict):
    obj = InferenceRequest(**data_dict)
    return obj.confidence
